methods.name: lastTimeRewardApplicable
methods.desc: Original: return block.timestamp < periodFinish ? block.timestamp : periodFinish

methods.name: rewardPerToken
methods.desc:
Original formula preserved exactly:
 rewardPerTokenStored + (lastTimeRewardApplicable - lastUpdateTime) * rewardRate * 1e18 / totalSupply

methods.name: earned
methods.desc:
Original formula preserved exactly:
 balances[account] * (rewardPerToken - userRewardPerTokenPaid[account]) / 1e18 + rewards[account]

methods.name: notifyRewardAmount
